# Field Crew AI

> Field Crew AI is a contractor operations consulting service for home services businesses. It helps roofing, HVAC, plumbing, electrical, and exterior contractors find and fix gaps in their lead flow, automate follow-up, and improve operations without replacing what already works.

## About

Field Crew AI is run by Josh Szepesi, a contractor operations specialist with close to a decade of experience in tech, operations, automation, and customer success, with direct exposure to the roofing industry and the software that runs it.

The diagnostic-first approach: every engagement starts with a working assessment before any tools or services are recommended. The assessment finds what is already there, what is not being used, and what is costing jobs.

Contact: Josh@fieldcrewai.com | 1.587.330.3602

## Primary Offer

**$497 Efficiency Assessment** — a 45-minute working session with Josh that maps the contractor's lead flow, identifies the highest-impact gaps, and delivers a ranked fix list. Includes what to do yourself, what costs nothing, and what is worth implementing with help.

Booking: https://fieldcrewai.com/#assessment

## Free Resource

**The Contractor Lead Flow Audit** — a free 12-question printable checklist that contractors can use to self-assess their lead flow before booking anything.

Available at: https://fieldcrewai.com/checklist

## Pages

- [Home](https://fieldcrewai.com/): Full-service homepage with assessment offer, stage selector, FAQ, and Calendly embed.
- [Checklist](https://fieldcrewai.com/checklist): Free printable lead flow audit checklist.
- [Blog / Resources](https://fieldcrewai.com/blog): Contractor-specific operations and automation content.
- [Contact](https://fieldcrewai.com/contact): Contact form for Operations Audit inquiries and general questions.
- [Privacy](https://fieldcrewai.com/privacy): Privacy policy and SMS consent terms.

## Services Described

- **Efficiency Assessment** ($497 one-time): Lead flow mapping, gap identification, ranked action plan.
- **Operations Audit** (contact to scope): For $2M+ multi-crew contractors. Full CRM audit, ad attribution analysis, pipeline review, rep follow-up analysis.
- **Implementation support** (optional, after assessment): Missed-call text-back, estimate follow-up automation, review request flows, AI phone coverage, website work, CRM configuration. Priced separately per project or service.

## Target Audience

- Residential and commercial home services contractors: roofing, HVAC, plumbing, electrical, exterior
- Business owners at any stage: solo operators, crew-based established businesses, multi-crew $2M+ operations
- Primary focus: North America (Canada and US)

## Key Topics Covered

- Contractor lead flow and pipeline management
- Missed-call handling and after-hours response
- Estimate follow-up automation
- CRM utilization (Jobber, Roofr, AccuLynx, ServiceTitan, Housecall Pro)
- Google Business Profile optimization
- Review request process automation
- Lead source attribution and ad spend ROI
- AI phone coverage for contractors
- Contractor website and intake optimization

## Tone and Style

Plain language. No hype. No "AI will transform your business" framing. Practical, contractor-friendly, diagnostic-first. Recommendations are specific, implementation-cost-transparent, and do not assume the contractor needs new software.
